summary: Iteration 113: Document View/Download Bug Fix Verification Complete. All critical fixes verified working: 1) Document View opens PDF preview correctly, 2) Document Download works (200 response, file downloads), 3) Files show correctly in Compliance File tab (NOT 'No active files'), 4) RTW section shows 1 verified file with View Files button, 5) DBS section shows 2 active files with View Files button, 6) Legacy Checklist View removed (no 'Previous Format' section), 7) Training tab shows only TrainingMatrix, 8) Recruitment tab shows Reference Integrity and CV Gaps, 9) Document action menu (3-dot) shows View, Download, Supersede/Replace, Move Category, Mark Uploaded in Error.
critical_code_review_comments: surfaceNormalizers.js fix verified: 'uploaded' status now included in active files filter (line 187-190)
UploadRequirementDrawer.js fix verified: URL construction handles /api/ prefix correctly (lines 150-154, 183-185)
EvidenceRow.js fix verified: Download button added with proper URL handling (lines 288-320)
Backend file_url returns API endpoints correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document View/Download bug fixed and verified. surfaceNormalizers.js now includes 'uploaded' status in active files filter. UploadRequirementDrawer.js handles /api/ URL prefix correctly. EvidenceRow.js has Download button. All tabs working correctly.

document_view_works.details: Clicking View on RTW/DBS file opens PDF preview. 3-dot menu shows View option. File endpoint returns 200 with PDF content.

document_download_works.details: Clicking Download downloads the file. Download endpoint returns 200 with 432KB file. 3-dot menu shows Download option.

files_show_correctly_in_compliance_file_.details: Files show correctly with 'Active Files' section. RTW shows 1 active file, DBS shows 2 active files. NOT showing 'No active files' message.

right_to_work_section_shows_files.details: RTW section shows 'right_to_work_check.pdf' with Verified badge. View Files button opens drawer with file details.

dbs_certificate_section_shows_files.details: DBS section shows 2 files: 'DBS CRSC (Alonge).pdf' (Verified) and 'DBS CERTIFICATE ALONGE PAGE 2.jpeg' (Awaiting Review). View Files, Upload, Resend buttons visible.

legacy_checklist_view_removed.details: No 'Previous Format' section found in Compliance File tab. Legacy checklist code removed from EmployeeProfilePage.js.

training_tab_shows_only_training_matrix.details: Training tab displays TrainingMatrix component with 6 Total Required, 6 Current, 100% Completion Progress. No legacy 'Training Records' card.

recruitment_tab_shows_reference_integrit.details: Recruitment tab shows Reference Integrity section with Reference 1 and Reference 2. Employment History & Gap Analysis section shows gap detection (76 days gap).

document_action_menu_shows_all_options.details: 3-dot menu shows: View, Download, Supersede/Replace, Move Category, Mark Uploaded in Error. All options visible and clickable.
